mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (name, type, threshold, face_value, discount_rate, valid_start, valid_end, total_quantity, claimed_quantity, used_quantity, per_user_limit, applicable_category, status, version) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{threshold}, #{faceValue}, #{discountRate}, #{validStart}, #{validEnd}, #{totalQuantity}, #{claimedQuantity}, #{usedQuantity}, #{perUserLimit}, #{applicableCategory}, #{status}, #{version})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE coupon SET used_quantity = used_quantity + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
